feasibility.comment: All three: docs are usable; structural rot would surface in months not days

specificity.comment: Tightly converged: no CLAUDE.md, untyped layer boundaries, no contributed skills

pattern_adherence.comment: Spread but all <=5: missing .claude/ scaffolding is the through-line

innovation.comment: Genuinely converged: validator-as-gate + retry-with-feedback is the real novelty

risk_awareness.comment: Wide split: docs are honest (council-3) but runtime gates are prompt-side only (council-1) and external boundaries lack retry/idempotency (council-2)

integration_realism.comment: Hard external couplings undeclared, partial-write recovery missing

state_model_coherence.comment: Strongest negative consensus: in-memory LEAD_HANDLES + sprawled data dirs + no state.json

kpi_measurability.comment: Zero externally-auditable metrics; tool_stats outputs prose

prioritized_gaps_unanimous: missing CLAUDE.md + .claude/ scaffolding (cited by 3/3 agents as #1 or #2 fix)
in-memory state lost on restart (LEAD_HANDLES, RUNNING_PILOTS) — cited by 3/3
no machine-readable health/state model — cited by 3/3 agents
no typed contracts at layer boundaries; pydantic dep unused — cited by 2/3
highest_priority_synthesis_fix: Bootstrap AGI-1 (.claude/ scaffold + agents/main-agent.md + .agent/) AND commit a SQLite (or JSON) durable state store keyed by lead_id × campaign_id × stage. The first satisfies pattern_adherence + specificity + ecosystem KPIs in one motion; the second satisfies state_model_coherence + risk_awareness + crash recovery. These are both Phase 4 tasks.
